dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Grand Hall of the Imperial Palace hummed with a tension thick enough to choke on. Every noble, every courtier, every servant held their breath, waiting for the Emperor's decree.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Another day, another performance.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: My family's reputation, my father's ambition, my own damn pride... all hinged on this single moment. The Crown Princess selection.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MURMURS

dialogue.speaker: PSYCHE CALLISTA
dialogue.line: Lady Medea.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: The saccharine voice, like honeyed poison. I turned, a practiced smile already plastered on my face.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Lady Psyche. You look radiant, as always.

dialogue.speaker: PSYCHE CALLISTA
dialogue.line: Oh, please. You flatter me. I'm merely... nervous.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GIGGLE (soft)

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Nervous? The darling of the empire? The one everyone adores? How quaint.

dialogue.speaker: PSYCHE CALLISTA
dialogue.line: We've both worked so hard, haven't we? No matter the outcome, I hope we can remain friends.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Friends? You mean, you hope I'll gracefully accept my defeat and disappear into the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Of course, Lady Psyche. A true friendship is built on mutual respect, wouldn't you agree?

dialogue.speaker: EROS ORNA DE ARAD
dialogue.line: And what a beautiful sight it is, to see two of the empire's brightest stars shining together.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Crown Prince Eros, a smile as captivating as it was insincere, approached us.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: The puppet master himself. Always playing to the crowd, always observing.

dialogue.speaker: PSYCHE CALLISTA
dialogue.line: Your Highness!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BOW (rustle)

dialogue.speaker: EROS ORNA DE ARAD
dialogue.line: Medea, my dear. You look stunning. That gown... it perfectly captures your fierce spirit.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: He knew exactly what to say. A compliment that sounded genuine, yet subtly reminded me of my 'unfeminine' ambition.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: Thank you, Your Highness. I merely dress to reflect the times.

dialogue.speaker: EROS ORNA DE ARAD
dialogue.line: And Psyche, your gentle grace is a balm to the soul. You both represent the pinnacle of our nobility.

dialogue.speaker: PSYCHE CALLISTA
dialogue.line: You are too kind, Your Highness.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A sudden hush fell over the hall as the Emperor's herald stepped forward.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TRUMPETS (fanfare)

dialogue.speaker: HERALD
dialogue.line: By the grace of the Emperor, and the will of the gods, the next Crown Princess of the Arad Empire shall be...

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: My heart hammered against my ribs. This was it. The culmination of years of training, of sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: HERALD
dialogue.line: ...Lady Psyche Callista!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASPS (collective)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHEERS (growing louder)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The hall erupted. Psyche's eyes widened in feigned surprise, a hand flying to her mouth. Eros offered her a dazzling, victorious smile.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: My vision blurred. A cold, bitter rage settled deep in my gut. It couldn't be. Not her. Not again.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: All my efforts, all my sacrifices... for this? To be cast aside for that fragile doll?

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: My father's face, a mask of disappointment, flashed in my mind. The whispers of the nobles, their pitying glances.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: I will not accept this. I will not be defeated. Not by her, and certainly not by him.

dialogue.speaker: MEDEA SOLON
dialogue.line: This isn't over. Not by a long shot.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLENCH (fist)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As Psyche was led to the Emperor, bathed in the light of triumph, Medea stood in the encroaching shadow, a silent vow burning in her eyes.

summary: Medea Solon attends the Crown Princess selection, enduring the superficial pleasantries of her rival Psyche Callista and the manipulative charm of Prince Eros. Despite her ambition and efforts, Psyche is chosen, leaving Medea consumed by rage and a fierce resolve for revenge.
